## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) — unless this is docs/CI only
- [ ] The engine stays model-free (no LLM calls in `src/engine/`)
